query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.tenant_id, t.name as tenant_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN tenants t ON u.tenant_id = t.id WHERE u.name ILIKE '%daniel%' OR u.name ILIKE '%lozano%';
